title: layia glandulosa
intro: Layia glandulosa, also known as the sticky gilia or sticky layia, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Layia glandulosa include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
